mapper.select: SELECT DPRT_CD,DPRT_NM,MOFC_BRN_CCD FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_CD = #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT (WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD
WHERE VALT_TRN > 0
AND VALT_G = '1' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN VALT_SDT AND VALT_EDT ) SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_V_I C ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER
AND (A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN OR (B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND NVL(C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, 0) < 7))
AND RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL
AND B.IMPRV_K_C > 0
AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('9') -- 완료(개선사항) 확인 AND B.MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} --해당지점 AND CASE WHEN C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C END IN (0,1,3,5) ) AS CNT --개별 지점담당자 개선건수 ,( SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM RBA_RSK_M A LEFT JOIN RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B ON A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER CROSS JOIN (SELECT VALT_SDT, VALT_EDT FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE VALT_TRN = (SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE VALT_G = 1 AND VALT_JUNGJI_YN = 0) )E LEFT JOIN RBA_TONGJE_M F ON B.TONGJE_NO = F.TONGJE_NO JOIN RBA_PROC_M G ON A.RSK_PROC_NO = G.RSK_PROC_NO LEFT JOIN RBA_RSK_TONGJE_MP H ON A.RSK_NO = H.RSK_NO WHERE A.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = 1 AND A.GYLJ_S_C = '1' AND DECODE(A.VALT_JINHG_S_C, 0, 1, A.VALT_JINHG_S_C) IN ('3', '5') AND A.MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS CNT1 FROM DUAL

WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD
WHERE VALT_TRN > 0
AND VALT_G = '1' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN VALT_SDT AND VALT_EDT ) SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT, 0 AS CNT1 FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_TRSK_VALT_I B LEFT JOIN RBA_TRSK_KCI_VALT_D C -- 통합위험_KCI_평가상세 ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER AND B.MNG_BRNO = C.MNG_BRNO
AND C.IMPRV_K_C > '0' --개선건만
LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_KCI_IMPRV_V_I D --KCI 개선내역 ON C.RSK_NO = D.RSK_NO AND C.VALT_TRN = D.VALT_TRN AND C.VALT_SER = D.VALT_SER AND C.MNG_BRNO = D.MNG_BRNO , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN AND A.RSK_B_C = 'T' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.MNG_BRNO != '9999' -- 공통 AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인
AND C.IMPRV_K_C > '0'
AND B.MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} --해당지점 AND CASE WHEN D.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C IS NULL THEN '0' ELSE D.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C END IN ('0','1','3','5')

SELECT (WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD
WHERE VALT_TRN > 0
AND VALT_G = '1' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN VALT_SDT AND VALT_EDT ) SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_V_I C ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER
, VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 현재회차 평가건 또는 이전회차 개신진행중 */
AND (A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN OR (B.IMPRV_K_C > '0' AND NVL(C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, 0) < 7))
AND RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL
AND B.IMPRV_K_C > '0'
AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('9') -- 완료(개선사항) 확인 AND C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C IN ('2','4','6') AND B.MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} --해당지점 ) AS CNT --개별 본부책임자 개선 결재건수 , (SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM RBA_RSK_M A LEFT JOIN RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B ON A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER CROSS JOIN (SELECT VALT_SDT, VALT_EDT FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE VALT_TRN = (SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE VALT_G = 1 AND VALT_JUNGJI_YN = 0) )E LEFT JOIN RBA_TONGJE_M F ON B.TONGJE_NO = F.TONGJE_NO JOIN RBA_PROC_M G ON A.RSK_PROC_NO = G.RSK_PROC_NO LEFT JOIN RBA_RSK_TONGJE_MP H ON A.RSK_NO = H.RSK_NO WHERE A.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = 1 AND A.GYLJ_S_C = '1' AND DECODE(A.VALT_JINHG_S_C, 0, 1, A.VALT_JINHG_S_C) IN ('4') AND A.MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS CNT1 --개별 본부책임자 평가 결재건수 FROM DUAL

WITH VALT_SCHD AS ( SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) AS VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD
WHERE VALT_TRN > 0
AND VALT_G = '1' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN VALT_SDT AND VALT_EDT ) SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT, 0 AS CNT1 FROM RBA_RSK_M A , RBA_TRSK_VALT_I B LEFT JOIN RBA_TRSK_KCI_VALT_D C -- 통합위험_KCI_평가상세 ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER AND B.MNG_BRNO = C.MNG_BRNO
AND C.IMPRV_K_C > '0' --개선건만
LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_KCI_IMPRV_V_I D --KCI 개선내역 ON C.RSK_NO = D.RSK_NO AND C.VALT_TRN = D.VALT_TRN AND C.VALT_SER = D.VALT_SER AND C.MNG_BRNO = D.MNG_BRNO , VALT_SCHD Z WHERE A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER /* 통합위험 현재회차에서만 구함. */ AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = Z.VALT_TRN AND A.RSK_B_C = 'T' AND A.USYN = '1' AND A.MNG_BRNO != '9999' -- 공통 AND A.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL AND B.VALT_JINHG_S_C IN ('2','9') -- 완료(재평가가능), 완료(개선사항) 확인
AND C.IMPRV_K_C > '0'
AND B.MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} --해당지점 AND D.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C IN ('2','4','6')
SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(RSK_B_C,'I',1,0)),0) AS CNT ,NVL(SUM(DECODE(RSK_B_C,'T',1,0)),0) AS CNT1 FROM RBA_RSK_M WHERE GYLJ_S_C = '0'

SELECT X.RSK_NO , X.RSK_G_C_NM || ' > ' || X.RSK_FLD_C_NM || ' > ' || X.RSK_BUMUN_C_NM AS RSK_B_NM , X.RSK_NM , X.RSK_CTNT , X.MNG_BRNO_NM , X.MNGR_JKW_NM , X.RSK_PROC_NM , X.SUB_PROC_NM , X.RSK_CAUSE_C , X.FCST_FRQ_VALT_GD , X.TRSR_LOSS_VALT_GD , X.INDV_RSK_VALT_PNT , X.INDV_RSK_GD , X.EFCT_VALT_DT , X.MNG_BRNO , X.LST_VALT_TRN , X.LST_VALT_SER , X.VALT_JINHG_S_C , X.CUR_VALT_TRN , X.REL_DATA_CTNT FROM (SELECT A.RSK_NO ,A.RSK_G_C, GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_G', A.RSK_G_C) AS RSK_G_C_NM ,A.RSK_FLD_C, GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_F', A.RSK_FLD_C) AS RSK_FLD_C_NM ,A.RSK_BUMUN_C, GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_B', A.RSK_BUMUN_C) AS RSK_BUMUN_C_NM ,A.RSK_NM ,A.RSK_CTNT ,A.MNG_BRNO, FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.MNG_BRNO, '') AS MNG_BRNO_NM ,A.MNGR_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(A.MNGR_JKW_NO) AS MNGR_JKW_NM ,G.RSK_PROC_NM ,G.SUB_PROC_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME('R028',A.RSK_CAUSE_C) AS RSK_CAUSE_C ,B.FCST_FRQ_VALT_GD, B.FCST_FRQ_VALT_CTNT --예상빈도평가 ,B.TRSR_LOSS_VALT_GD, B.TRSR_LOSS_VALT_CTNT --재무손실 ,B.INDV_RSK_VALT_PNT, B.INDV_RSK_GD --개인위험평가점수 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.EFCT_VALT_DT,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS EFCT_VALT_DT --영향평가일자 ,A.LST_VALT_TRN, A.LST_VALT_SER --평가회차/순번 ,A.VALT_JINHG_S_C --평가진행상태 ,(SELECT VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE VALT_G = '1' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN VALT_SDT AND VALT_EDT AND VALT_JUNGJI_YN = '0' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS CUR_VALT_TRN -- 현재평가회차 ,REL_DATA_CTNT FROM RBA_RSK_M A -- 개별위험 LEFT JOIN RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B -- 개별위험평가 ON A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER JOIN RBA_PROC_M G ON A.RSK_PROC_NO = G.RSK_PROC_NO WHERE A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = DECODE(#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_TRN,0,A.LST_VALT_TRN,A.LST_VALT_TRN) AND A.LST_VALT_SER = DECODE(#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_SER,0,A.LST_VALT_SER,A.LST_VALT_SER) ) X

SELECT X.TONGJE_NO , X.TONGJE_G_C_NM || ' > ' || X.TONGJE_FLD_C_NM || ' > ' || X.TONGJE_BUMUN_C_NM AS TONGJE_B_NM , X.TONGJE_NM , X.TONGJE_BASE_CTNT , X.DESN_VALT_GD , X.UNYUNG_VALT_GD , X.MOFC_TONGJE_VALT_PNT , X.MOFC_TONGJE_GD , X.TONGJE_VALT_DT , X.TONGJE_CH_RESC_NM , X.TONGJE_CH_CAUSE_NM , X.TONGJE_CH_ANAL_CTNT , X.TONGJE_VALT_BAS_SER , X.TONGJE_CH_RESC_C , X.TONGJE_CH_CAUSE_C FROM ( SELECT F1.TONGJE_NO ,F1.TONGJE_G_C, GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('TONGJE_G', F1.TONGJE_G_C) AS TONGJE_G_C_NM ,F1.TONGJE_FLD_C, GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('TONGJE_F', F1.TONGJE_FLD_C) AS TONGJE_FLD_C_NM ,F1.TONGJE_BUMUN_C, GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('TONGJE_B', F1.TONGJE_BUMUN_C) AS TONGJE_BUMUN_C_NM ,F1.TONGJE_NM ,F1.TONGJE_BASE_CTNT || DECODE(TONGJE_BASE_CTNT1, NULL, '', CHR(13)||CHR(10)||CHR(13)||CHR(10) || TONGJE_BASE_CTNT1) AS TONGJE_BASE_CTNT ,B.DESN_VALT_GD, B.DESN_VALT_CTNT --설계평가 ,B.UNYUNG_VALT_GD, B.UNYUNG_VALT_CTNT --운영평가내용 ,B.MOFC_TONGJE_VALT_PNT, B.MOFC_TONGJE_GD --본부통제평가 ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.TONGJE_VALT_DT,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS TONGJE_VALT_DT ,B.TONGJE_CH_RESC_C, GET_CODE_NAME('R009',B.TONGJE_CH_RESC_C) AS TONGJE_CH_RESC_NM --통제취약성원천 R009 ,B.TONGJE_CH_CAUSE_C, GET_CODE_NAME('R010',B.TONGJE_CH_CAUSE_C) AS TONGJE_CH_CAUSE_NM --통제취약성원인 R010 ,B.TONGJE_CH_ANAL_CTNT ,B.TONGJE_VALT_BAS_SER FROM RBA_RSK_M A -- 개별위험 LEFT JOIN RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B -- 개별위험평가 ON A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO LEFT JOIN RBA_RSK_TONGJE_MP H ON A.RSK_NO = H.RSK_NO JOIN RBA_TONGJE_M F1 ON NVL(B.TONGJE_NO, H.TONGJE_NO) = F1.TONGJE_NO WHERE A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND NVL(B.VALT_TRN,A.LST_VALT_TRN) = DECODE(#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_TRN,0,A.LST_VALT_TRN,#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND NVL(B.VALT_SER,A.LST_VALT_SER) = DECODE(#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_SER,0,A.LST_VALT_SER,#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ) X

SELECT A.RSK_NO ,B.REMDR_RSK_GD ,K.CD_NM AS IMPRV_STRG_CTNT -- 개선전략 ,M.CD_NM AS REMDR_RSK_GD_G -- 개선그룹 ,REMDR_RSK_GD_SER ,IMPRV_K_C -- 개선종류코드 ,LST_VALT_YN ,VALT_DT FROM RBA_RSK_M A -- 개별위험 LEFT JOIN RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B -- 개별위험평가 ON A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO LEFT JOIN NIC92B K ON K.CD = 'R013' -- 등급별 개선전략 AND B.REMDR_RSK_GD = K.CNTNT LEFT JOIN NIC92B M ON M.CD = 'R014' -- 등급별 개선그룹 AND B.REMDR_RSK_GD = M.CNTNT WHERE A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.VALT_TRN = DECODE(#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_TRN,0,A.LST_VALT_TRN,#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND B.VALT_SER = DECODE(#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_SER,0,A.LST_VALT_SER,#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

SELECT A.RSK_NO ,B.IMPRV_K_C, GET_CODE_NAME('R023',B.IMPRV_K_C) AS IMPRV_PROC_HMK_NM -- 개선종류 ,ROUND((L.PLCY_DSCT_GD + L.RSK_PROC_GD + L.INJK_RESRC_GD + L.INF_SYS_GD)/4,2) AS IMPRV_VALT_JONGHAP_GD ,M.IMPRV_V_C, GET_CODE_NAME('R021',M.IMPRV_V_C) AS IMPRV_V_NM -- 개선분류 ,M.IMPRV_G_C, GET_CODE_NAME('R022',M.IMPRV_G_C) AS IMPRV_B_NM -- 개선구분 ,M.IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C, GET_CODE_NAME('R024',M.IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C) AS IMPRV_K_NM -- 개선항목 ,M.IMPRV_PROC_CTNT ,A.MNGR_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(A.MNGR_JKW_NO) AS MNGR_JKW_NM ,M.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_DT -- 개선처리승인일자 FROM RBA_RSK_M A -- 개별위험 LEFT JOIN RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B -- 개별위험평가 ON A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO LEFT JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_V_I L -- 통제개선역량평가 ON B.RSK_NO = L.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = L.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = L.VALT_SER LEFT JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_P_D M ON B.RSK_NO = M.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = M.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = M.VALT_SER AND ( (L.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C IN ('1','2') AND M.IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C = '1') OR (L.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C IN ('3','4') AND M.IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C = '2') OR (L.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C IN ('5','6','7') AND M.IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C = '3') ) WHERE A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.VALT_TRN = DECODE(#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_TRN,0,A.LST_VALT_TRN,#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND B.VALT_SER = DECODE(#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_SER,0,A.LST_VALT_SER,#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND B.GYLJ_DT IS NOT NULL ORDER BY M.IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C

SELECT X.KRI_NO ,MIN(X.KRI_NM) AS KRI_NM ,MIN(X.UNIT_NM) AS UNIT_NM ,MIN(DECODE(X.RNUM,1, DECODE(X.KRI_V,'','',X.KRI_V||' ('||X.KRI_CALC_HIS||')'))) KRIV1 ,MIN(DECODE(X.RNUM,2, DECODE(X.KRI_V,'','',X.KRI_V||' ('||X.KRI_CALC_HIS||')'))) KRIV2 ,MIN(DECODE(X.RNUM,3, DECODE(X.KRI_V,'','',X.KRI_V||' ('||X.KRI_CALC_HIS||')'))) KRIV3 ,MIN(X.KRI_CTNT) AS KRI_CTNT ,MIN(X.RSK_G_C) AS RSK_G_C ,MIN(X.RSK_FLD_C) AS RSK_FLD_C ,MIN(X.RSK_BUMUN_C) AS RSK_BUMUN_C ,MAX(X.IN_DT) AS IN_DT FROM ( SELECT P.KRI_NO ,P.KRI_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME('R011',P.UNIT_C) AS UNIT_NM ,TO_CHAR(Q.KRI_V, 'fm999,999,999,999,999,990') AS KRI_V ,Q.KRI_CALC_HIS ,P.KRI_CTNT ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY B.KRI_NO ORDER BY Q.IN_DT DESC) RNUM ,B.RSK_G_C ,B.RSK_FLD_C ,B.RSK_BUMUN_C ,Q.IN_DT FROM RBA_RSK_M A -- 개별위험 JOIN RBA_IRSK_KRI_VALT_D B -- 개별위험 KRI 평가 상세 ON A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO JOIN RBA_KRI_M P -- KRI기본 ON B.KRI_NO = P.KRI_NO LEFT JOIN RBA_IKRI_D Q -- 개별KRI기본상세 ON P.KRI_NO = Q.KRI_NO WHERE A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.VALT_TRN = DECODE(#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_TRN,0,A.LST_VALT_TRN,#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND B.VALT_SER = DECODE(#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_SER,0,A.LST_VALT_SER,#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ) X WHERE X.RNUM < 3 GROUP BY X.KRI_NO ORDER BY X.KRI_NO

SELECT X.KCI_NO ,MIN(X.KCI_NM) AS KCI_NM ,MIN(X.UNIT_NM) AS UNIT_NM ,MIN(DECODE(X.RNUM,1, DECODE(X.KCI_V,'','',X.KCI_V||' ('||X.KCI_CALC_HIS||')'))) KCIV1 ,MIN(DECODE(X.RNUM,2, DECODE(X.KCI_V,'','',X.KCI_V||' ('||X.KCI_CALC_HIS||')'))) KCIV2 ,MIN(DECODE(X.RNUM,3, DECODE(X.KCI_V,'','',X.KCI_V||' ('||X.KCI_CALC_HIS||')'))) KCIV3 ,MIN(X.KCI_CTNT) AS KCI_CTNT ,MIN(X.TONGJE_G_C) AS TONGJE_G_C ,MIN(X.TONGJE_FLD_C) AS TONGJE_FLD_C ,MIN(X.TONGJE_BUMUN_C) AS TONGJE_BUMUN_C ,MAX(X.IN_DT) AS IN_DT FROM ( SELECT R.KCI_NO ,R.KCI_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME('R011',R.UNIT_C) AS UNIT_NM ,TO_CHAR(S.KCI_V, 'fm999,999,999,990') AS KCI_V ,S.KCI_CALC_HIS ,R.KCI_CTNT ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY B.KCI_NO ORDER BY S.IN_DT DESC) RNUM ,B.TONGJE_G_C ,B.TONGJE_FLD_C ,B.TONGJE_BUMUN_C ,S.IN_DT FROM RBA_RSK_M A -- 개별위험 JOIN RBA_IRSK_KCI_VALT_D B -- 개별위험 KRI 평가 상세 ON A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO JOIN RBA_KCI_M R -- KRI기본 ON B.KCI_NO = R.KCI_NO LEFT JOIN RBA_IKCI_D S -- 개별KRI기본상세 ON R.KCI_NO = S.KCI_NO WHERE A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.VALT_TRN = DECODE(#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_TRN,0,A.LST_VALT_TRN,#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND B.VALT_SER = DECODE(#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_SER,0,A.LST_VALT_SER,#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ) X WHERE X.RNUM < 3 GROUP BY X.KCI_NO ORDER BY X.KCI_NO

SELECT A.RSK_NO ,B.ATTCH_FILE_NO, B.FILE_SER, REPLACE(B.FILE_POS,'\','/') AS FILE_POS , B.LOSC_FILE_NM, B.PHSC_FILE_NM ,B.DR_DT FROM RBA_RSK_M A -- 개별위험 ,RBA_ATTCH_FILE B --첨부파일 WHERE A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = DECODE(#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_TRN,0,A.LST_VALT_TRN,A.LST_VALT_TRN) AND A.LST_VALT_SER = DECODE(#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_SER,0,A.LST_VALT_SER,A.LST_VALT_SER) AND A.ATTCH_FILE_NO = B.ATTCH_FILE_NO ORDER BY B.FILE_SER

SELECT X.RSK_NO , X.RSK_G_C_NM || ' > ' || X.RSK_FLD_C_NM || ' > ' || X.RSK_BUMUN_C_NM AS RSK_B_NM , X.RSK_NM , X.RSK_CTNT , X.RSK_PROC_NM , X.SUB_PROC_NM , X.MNG_BRNO , X.LST_VALT_TRN , X.LST_VALT_SER , X.VALT_JINHG_S_C , X.CUR_VALT_TRN , X.REL_DATA_CTNT FROM ( SELECT A.RSK_NO ,A.RSK_G_C, GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_G', A.RSK_G_C) AS RSK_G_C_NM ,A.RSK_FLD_C, GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_F', A.RSK_FLD_C) AS RSK_FLD_C_NM ,A.RSK_BUMUN_C, GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('RSK_B', A.RSK_BUMUN_C) AS RSK_BUMUN_C_NM ,A.RSK_NM ,A.RSK_CTNT ,G.RSK_PROC_NM ,G.SUB_PROC_NM ,A.MNG_BRNO ,A.LST_VALT_TRN, A.LST_VALT_SER --평가회차/순번 ,A.VALT_JINHG_S_C --평가진행상태 ,(SELECT VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE VALT_G = '1' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN VALT_SDT AND VALT_EDT AND VALT_JUNGJI_YN = '0' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS CUR_VALT_TRN -- 현재평가회차 ,REL_DATA_CTNT FROM RBA_RSK_M A -- 개별위험 LEFT JOIN RBA_TRSK_VALT_I B -- 통합위험 평가내역 ON A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER AND B.MNG_BRNO = NVL(#{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'9999') --영업점 총괄지점코드 9999로 활용 LEFT JOIN RBA_PROC_M G ON A.RSK_PROC_NO = G.RSK_PROC_NO WHERE A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = DECODE(#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_TRN,0,A.LST_VALT_TRN,A.LST_VALT_TRN) AND A.LST_VALT_SER = DECODE(#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_SER,0,A.LST_VALT_SER,A.LST_VALT_SER) ) X

SELECT A.RSK_NO ,B.REMDR_RSK_GD ,K.CD_NM AS IMPRV_STRG_CTNT -- 개선전략 ,M.CD_NM AS REMDR_RSK_GD_G -- 개선그룹 ,NVL(B.REMDR_RSK_GD_SER, (SELECT LST_SER FROM RBA_RSK_GD_M WHERE RSK_GD_HMK_C = 3)) AS REMDR_RSK_GD_SER ,B.LST_TONGJE_VALT_PNT, B.LST_TONGJE_VALT_GD --최종통제점수/등급 ,B.KRI_UNTY_RSK_VALT_PNT, B.KRI_UNTY_RSK_GD --KRI 평균 ,NVL(B.KRI_JIPYO_PNT_SER, (SELECT MAX(LST_SER) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RSK_NO DESC) AS LST_SER FROM RBA_JIPYO_PNT_M WHERE RSK_NO IN ('RK0000000000', #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = 'KRI')) AS KRI_JIPYO_PNT_SER --KRI지표점수일련번호 ,NVL(B.TONGJE_RT_SER, (SELECT MAX(LST_SER) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RSK_NO DESC) AS LST_SER FROM RBA_TONGJE_RT_M WHERE RSK_NO IN ('RK0000000000', #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}))) AS TONGJE_RT_SER --통제비율일련번호 ,B.KCI_TONGJE_EFCT_VALT_PNT, B.KCI_TONGJE_EFCT_GD --KCI 평균 ,NVL(B.KCI_JIPYO_PNT_SER, (SELECT MAX(LST_SER) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY RSK_NO DESC) AS LST_SER FROM RBA_JIPYO_PNT_M WHERE RSK_NO IN ('RK0000000000', #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = 'KCI')) AS KCI_JIPYO_PNT_SER --KCI지표점수기준일련번호 ,NVL(B.KCI_JIPYO_VALT_RFLX_RT, 0.00) AS KCI_JIPYO_VALT_RFLX_RT --KCI반영비율 ,B.UNYUNG_TONGJE_VALT_PNT, B.UNYUNG_TONGJE_GD --통제 평균 (현재안씀, 0) ,NVL(B.TONGJE_VALT_RFLX_RT,0.00) AS TONGJE_VALT_RFLX_RT --통제평가반영비율 (현재 0) ,B.LST_VALT_YN ,B.VALT_DT FROM RBA_RSK_M A -- 위험 LEFT JOIN RBA_TRSK_VALT_I B -- 통합위험 평가내역 ON A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND B.MNG_BRNO = NVL(#{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'9999') --영업점 총괄지점코드 9999로 활용 LEFT JOIN NIC92B K ON K.CD = 'R013' -- 등급별 개선전략 AND B.REMDR_RSK_GD = K.CNTNT LEFT JOIN NIC92B M ON M.CD = 'R014' -- 등급별 개선그룹 AND B.REMDR_RSK_GD = M.CNTNT WHERE A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.VALT_TRN = DECODE(#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_TRN,0,A.LST_VALT_TRN,#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND B.VALT_SER = DECODE(#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_SER,0,A.LST_VALT_SER,#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND A.MNG_BRNO = NVL(#{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'9999') --영업점 총괄지점코드 9999로 활용

SELECT P.KRI_NO ,P.KRI_NM ,GET_CODE_NAME('R011',P.UNIT_C) AS UNIT_NM ,TO_CHAR(Q.KRI_V, 'fm999,999,999,999,999,990') AS KRI_V ,Q.VALT_PNT ,Q.VALT_GD ,Q.KRI_GJDT ,P.KRI_CTNT ,A.RSK_G_C ,A.RSK_FLD_C ,A.RSK_BUMUN_C FROM RBA_RSK_M A -- 개별위험 JOIN RBA_RSK_KRI_MP T ON A.RSK_NO = T.RSK_NO JOIN RBA_KRI_M P -- KRI기본 ON T.KRI_NO = P.KRI_NO LEFT JOIN RBA_TKRI_S Q --통합 KRI내역 ON P.KRI_NO = Q.KRI_NO AND Q.MNG_BRNO = NVL(#{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'9999') WHERE A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = DECODE(#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_TRN,0,A.LST_VALT_TRN,#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = DECODE(#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_SER,0,A.LST_VALT_SER,#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND P.USYN = 1 ORDER BY P.KRI_NO

SELECT P.KCI_NO , P.KCI_NM , GET_CODE_NAME('R011',P.UNIT_C) AS UNIT_NM , TO_CHAR(Q.KCI_V, 'fm999,999,999,999,999,990') AS KCI_V , Q.VALT_PNT , Q.VALT_GD , Q.KCI_GJDT , P.TONGJE_G_C, GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('TONGJE_G', P.TONGJE_G_C) AS TONGJE_G_C_NM , P.TONGJE_FLD_C, GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('TONGJE_F', P.TONGJE_FLD_C) AS TONGJE_FLD_C_NM , P.TONGJE_BUMUN_C, GET_RBA_RSK_NAME('TONGJE_B', P.TONGJE_BUMUN_C) AS TONGJE_BUMUN_C_NM , P.KCI_CTNT FROM RBA_RSK_M A -- 위험 JOIN RBA_RSK_KCI_MP T -- KCI 매핑 ON A.RSK_NO = T.RSK_NO JOIN RBA_KCI_M P -- KCI기본 ON T.KCI_NO = P.KCI_NO LEFT JOIN RBA_TKCI_D Q -- 통합KCI기본상세 ON P.KCI_NO = Q.KCI_NO AND Q.MNG_BRNO = NVL(#{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'9999') WHERE A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = DECODE(#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_TRN,0,A.LST_VALT_TRN,#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = DECODE(#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR},NULL,A.LST_VALT_SER,0,A.LST_VALT_SER,#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND P.USYN = 1 ORDER BY P.KCI_NO

SELECT C.KCI_NO ,C.IMPRV_K_C, GET_CODE_NAME('R023',C.IMPRV_K_C) AS IMPRV_K_NM -- 개선종류 ,L.IMPRV_VALT_JONGHAP_GD ,M.IMPRV_V_C, GET_CODE_NAME('R021',M.IMPRV_V_C) AS IMPRV_V_NM -- 개선분류 ,M.IMPRV_G_C, GET_CODE_NAME('R022',M.IMPRV_G_C) AS IMPRV_B_NM -- 개선구분 ,M.IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C, GET_CODE_NAME('R024',M.IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C) AS IMPRV_PROC_HMK_NM -- 개선항목 ,M.IMPRV_PROC_CTNT ,M.IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(M.IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO) AS IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NM ,M.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_DT --개선처리 승인일자 FROM RBA_TRSK_VALT_I B -- 통합위험 평가내역 LEFT JOIN RBA_TRSK_KCI_VALT_D C -- 통합위험_KCI_평가상세 ON B.RSK_NO = C.RSK_NO AND B.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND B.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER AND B.MNG_BRNO = C.MNG_BRNO LEFT JOIN RBA_KCI_IMPRV_V_I L -- KCI 개선역량평가 상세 ON C.RSK_NO = L.RSK_NO AND C.VALT_TRN = L.VALT_TRN AND C.VALT_SER = L.VALT_SER AND C.MNG_BRNO = L.MNG_BRNO LEFT JOIN RBA_KCI_IMPRV_P_D M -- KCI 개선처리현황 상세 ON L.RSK_NO = M.RSK_NO AND L.VALT_TRN = M.VALT_TRN AND L.VALT_SER = M.VALT_SER AND L.MNG_BRNO = M.MNG_BRNO AND L.KCI_NO = M.KCI_NO AND ( (L.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C IN ('1','2') AND M.IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C = '1') OR (L.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C IN ('3','4') AND M.IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C = '2') OR (L.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C IN ('5','6','7') AND M.IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C = '3') ) WHERE B.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND B.MNG_BRNO = NVL(#{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'9999') AND C.IMPRV_K_C = '4' --개선구분종류 (차후수정필요) AND NVL(L.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C,0) < 7 ORDER BY C.KCI_NO, M.IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C
mapper.update: INSERT INTO RBA_PROC_M ( RSK_PROC_NO ,RSK_PROC_NM ,SUB_PROC_NM ,MNG_BRNO ,USYN ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ,CHG_DT ,CHG_TIME ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO) VALUES ( #{RSK_PROC_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{RSK_PROC_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{SUB_PROC_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{USYN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT RBA_RSK_C,RBA_RSK_C_V,RBA_RSK_C_NM,HRNK_RBA_RSK_C,HRNK_RBA_RSK_C_V,HRNK_RBA_RSK_C_NM, SNO, USYN, CHG_DT, GET_LOGINID_NAME(CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM RBA_RSK_C_M WHERE RBA_RSK_C = #{RBA_RSK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND LENGTH(RBA_RSK_C_V) = 1 ORDER BY SNO
SELECT Count(*) AS CNT FROM RBA_KRI_M WHERE RSK_G_C = #{RBA_RSK_C_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND USYN = '1'
SELECT Count(*) AS CNT FROM RBA_KRI_M WHERE RSK_FLD_C = #{RBA_RSK_C_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND USYN = '1'
SELECT Count(*) AS CNT FROM RBA_KRI_M WHERE RSK_BUMUN_C = #{RBA_RSK_C_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND USYN = '1'

SELECT RBA_RSK_C,RBA_RSK_C_V,RBA_RSK_C_NM,HRNK_RBA_RSK_C,HRNK_RBA_RSK_C_V,HRNK_RBA_RSK_C_NM, SNO, USYN, CHG_DT, GET_LOGINID_NAME(CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM RBA_RSK_C_M WHERE RBA_RSK_C = #{RBA_RSK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} --AND USYN = 1 ORDER BY SNO

SELECT RBA_RSK_C,RBA_RSK_C_V,RBA_RSK_C_NM,HRNK_RBA_RSK_C,HRNK_RBA_RSK_C_V,HRNK_RBA_RSK_C_NM, SNO, USYN, CHG_DT, GET_LOGINID_NAME(CHG_OP_JKW_NO) AS CHG_OP_JKW_NO FROM RBA_RSK_C_M WHERE RBA_RSK_C = #{RBA_RSK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND HRNK_RBA_RSK_C_V = #{HRNK_RBA_RSK_C_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR} --AND USYN = 1 ORDER BY SNO
SELECT Count(*) AS CNT FROM RBA_KCI_M WHERE TONGJE_G_C = #{RBA_RSK_C_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND USYN = '1'
SELECT Count(*) AS CNT FROM RBA_KCI_M WHERE TONGJE_FLD_C = #{RBA_RSK_C_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND USYN = '1'
SELECT Count(*) AS CNT FROM RBA_KCI_M WHERE TONGJE_BUMUN_C = #{RBA_RSK_C_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND USYN = '1'

SELECT NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'I1' AND VALT_GD = 1) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_A1 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'I1' AND VALT_GD = 2) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_A2 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'I1' AND VALT_GD = 3) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_A3 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'I1' AND VALT_GD = 4) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_A4 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'I1' AND VALT_GD = 5) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_A5 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'I2' AND VALT_GD = 1) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_B1 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'I2' AND VALT_GD = 2) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_B2 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'I2' AND VALT_GD = 3) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_B3 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'I2' AND VALT_GD = 4) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_B4 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'I2' AND VALT_GD = 5) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_B5 --,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'I3' AND VALT_GD = 1) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_C1 --,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'I3' AND VALT_GD = 2) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_C2 --,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'I3' AND VALT_GD = 3) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_C3 --,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'I3' AND VALT_GD = 4) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_C4 FROM RBA_VALT_B_M A, RBA_VALT_B_S B WHERE A.VALT_HMK_C LIKE 'I' || '%' AND A.VALT_HMK_C = B.VALT_HMK_C AND A.LST_SER = B.VALT_BAS_SER

SELECT NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'T1' AND VALT_GD = 1) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_D1 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'T1' AND VALT_GD = 2) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_D2 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'T1' AND VALT_GD = 3) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_D3 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'T1' AND VALT_GD = 4) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_D4 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'T2' AND VALT_GD = 1) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_E1 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'T2' AND VALT_GD = 2) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_E2 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'T2' AND VALT_GD = 3) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_E3 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.VALT_HMK_C = 'T2' AND VALT_GD = 4) THEN B.VALT_BAS_CTNT END),' ') AS VALT_HMK_C_E4 FROM RBA_VALT_B_M A, RBA_VALT_B_S B WHERE A.VALT_HMK_C LIKE 'T' || '%' AND A.VALT_HMK_C = B.VALT_HMK_C AND A.LST_SER = B.VALT_BAS_SER
mapper.update: MERGE INTO RBA_VALT_B_M A USING DUAL ON (VALT_HMK_C = #{VALT_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET VALT_HMK_C_NM = #{VALT_HMK_C_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,VALT_HMK_CTNT = #{VALT_HMK_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,LST_SER = (SELECT (NVL(LST_SER,0) + 1) FROM RBA_VALT_B_M WHERE VALT_HMK_C = #{VALT_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ,CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( VALT_HMK_C ,VALT_HMK_C_NM ,VALT_HMK_CTNT ,LST_SER ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ,CHG_DT ,CHG_TIME ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{VALT_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{VALT_HMK_C_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{VALT_HMK_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,1 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 5 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 1) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD51 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 5 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 2) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD52 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 5 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 3) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD53 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 5 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 4) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD54 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 5 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 5) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD55
,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 4 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 1) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD41 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 4 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 2) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD42 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 4 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 3) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD43 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 4 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 4) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD44 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 4 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 5) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD45
,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 3 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 1) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD31 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 3 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 2) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD32 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 3 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 3) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD33 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 3 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 4) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD34 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 3 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 5) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD35
,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 2 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 1) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD21 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 2 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 2) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD22 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 2 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 3) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD23 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 2 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 4) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD24 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 2 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 5) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD25
,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 1 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 1) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD11 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 1 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 2) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD12 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 1 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 3) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD13 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 1 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 4) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD14 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_Y_V = 1 AND RSK_GD_X_V = 5) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS GD15
FROM RBA_RSK_GD_M A, RBA_RSK_GD_S B WHERE A.RSK_GD_HMK_C = #{RSK_GD_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.RSK_GD_HMK_C = B.RSK_GD_HMK_C AND A.LST_SER = B.RSK_GD_SER
mapper.update: MERGE INTO RBA_RSK_GD_M A USING DUAL ON (RSK_GD_HMK_C = #{RSK_GD_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET RSK_GD_HMK_C_NM = GET_CODE_NAME('R006',#{RSK_GD_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ,LST_SER = (SELECT (NVL(LST_SER,0) + 1) FROM RBA_RSK_GD_M WHERE RSK_GD_HMK_C = #{RSK_GD_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ,CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( RSK_GD_HMK_C ,RSK_GD_HMK_C_NM ,LST_SER ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ,CHG_DT ,CHG_TIME ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{RSK_GD_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,GET_CODE_NAME('R006',#{RSK_GD_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ,1 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = 'KRI' AND VALT_GD = 1) THEN B.MAX_PNT END),'0') AS TKRI_E1 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = 'KRI' AND VALT_GD = 2) THEN B.MAX_PNT END),'0') AS TKRI_E2 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = 'KRI' AND VALT_GD = 3) THEN B.MAX_PNT END),'0') AS TKRI_E3 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = 'KRI' AND VALT_GD = 4) THEN B.MAX_PNT END),'4') AS TKRI_E4 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = 'KCI' AND VALT_GD = 1) THEN B.MAX_PNT END),'0') AS TKCI_E1 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = 'KCI' AND VALT_GD = 2) THEN B.MAX_PNT END),'0') AS TKCI_E2 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = 'KCI' AND VALT_GD = 3) THEN B.MAX_PNT END),'0') AS TKCI_E3 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (A.JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = 'KCI' AND VALT_GD = 4) THEN B.MAX_PNT END),'4') AS TKCI_E4 ,NVL(MAX(TONGJE_GD_RT),'50') AS TONGJE_GD_RT ,NVL(MAX(KCI_GD_RT),'50') AS KCI_GD_RT FROM RBA_JIPYO_PNT_M A, RBA_JIPYO_PNT_S B, (SELECT NVL(MAX(TONGJE_GD_RT),'50') AS TONGJE_GD_RT ,NVL(MAX(KCI_GD_RT),'50') AS KCI_GD_RT FROM RBA_TONGJE_RT_M A, RBA_TONGJE_RT_S B WHERE A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_SER = B.TONGJE_RT_SER) C WHERE A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = B.JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C AND A.LST_SER = B.JIPYO_PNT_SER
mapper.update: MERGE INTO RBA_JIPYO_PNT_M A USING DUAL ON (RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = #{JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C_NM = #{JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,LST_SER = (SELECT (NVL(LST_SER,0) + 1) FROM RBA_JIPYO_PNT_M WHERE RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = #{JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ,CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( RSK_NO ,JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C ,JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C_NM ,LST_SER ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ,CHG_DT ,CHG_TIME ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,1 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

INSERT INTO RBA_JIPYO_PNT_S ( RSK_NO ,JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C ,JIPYO_PNT_SER ,VALT_GD ,MAX_PNT ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,(SELECT NVL(LST_SER,1) FROM RBA_JIPYO_PNT_M WHERE RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = #{JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ,#{VALT_GD,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{MAX_PNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

MERGE INTO RBA_TONGJE_RT_M A USING DUAL ON (RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET LST_SER = (SELECT (NVL(LST_SER,0) + 1) FROM RBA_TONGJE_RT_M WHERE RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) ,CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( RSK_NO ,LST_SER ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ,CHG_DT ,CHG_TIME ,CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,1 ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

INSERT INTO RBA_TONGJE_RT_S ( RSK_NO ,TONGJE_RT_SER ,TONGJE_GD_RT ,KCI_GD_RT ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,(SELECT NVL(LST_SER,1) FROM RBA_TONGJE_RT_M WHERE RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) ,#{TONGJE_GD_RT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{KCI_GD_RT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
DELETE FROM RBA_TONGJE_RT_M WHERE RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
DELETE FROM RBA_TONGJE_RT_S WHERE RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT A.MNG_BRNO, FN_CDINFO_VAR('DPT', A.MNG_BRNO, '') AS MNG_BRNO_NM ,A.RSK_PROC_NO, A.RSK_PROC_NM, A.SUB_PROC_NM, B.RSK_NO FROM RBA_PROC_M A LEFT OUTER JOIN RBA_RSK_M B ON A.RSK_PROC_NO = B.RSK_PROC_NO AND B.USYN = 1 WHERE A.USYN = 1 AND A.MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO RBA_PROC_H (RSK_PROC_NO ,CHG_SER ,RSK_PROC_NM ,SUB_PROC_NM ,MNG_BRNO ,USYN ,DR_DT ,DR_TIME ,DR_OP_JKW_NO ) (SELECT RSK_PROC_NO ,NVL((SELECT (NVL(MAX(CHG_SER),0) + 1) FROM RBA_PROC_H WHERE RSK_PROC_NO = #{RSK_PROC_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}),1) ,RSK_PROC_NM ,SUB_PROC_NM ,MNG_BRNO ,USYN ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} FROM RBA_PROC_M WHERE RSK_PROC_NO = #{RSK_PROC_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN VALT_SDT AND VALT_EDT AND VALT_JUNGJI_YN = 0
SELECT GET_RBA_KEY_RTN(#{KEY_GUBUN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{RBA_G,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{RBA_F,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{RBA_B,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS RBA_KEY FROM DUAL
SELECT A.*, GET_DEP_NAME(DEP_ID) AS DEP_ID_NM FROM C_USER A WHERE LOGIN_ID LIKE '%'||#{SEARCH_VALUE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%' OR USER_NM LIKE '%'||#{SEARCH_VALUE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%'
SELECT * FROM NIC41B WHERE DPRT_NM LIKE '%'||#{SEARCH_VALUE,jdbcType=VARCHAR}||'%'

SELECT KRI_NO, DR_DT, KRI_CALC_HIS AS CAL, KRI_V, DECODE(SIGN(NVL(KRI_V-LAG(KRI_V) OVER (ORDER BY DR_DT ASC),'0')),1,'+'||(KRI_V-LAG(KRI_V) OVER (ORDER BY DR_DT ASC)), -1, (KRI_V-LAG(KRI_V) OVER (ORDER BY DR_DT ASC)), 0 , 0) AS STATE, IN_DT, DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM RBA_IKRI_D WHERE KRI_NO = #{KRI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY DR_DT DESC
mapper.update:
MERGE INTO RBA_KRI_M A USING DUAL ON (KRI_NO = #{KRI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET
KRI_NM = #{KRI_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
KRI_CTNT = #{CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UNIT_C = #{UNIT,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BTCH_PGM_NM = #{BTCH_PGM_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CALC_CRELT_V = #{CALC_CRELT_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESC_G_C = #{RESC_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USYN = #{USYN,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( KRI_NO , --KRI번호 RSK_G_C , --위험구분코드 RSK_FLD_C , --위험영역코드 RSK_BUMUN_C , --위험부문코드 RSK_B_C , --위험분류코드
KRI_NM , --KRI명
KRI_CTNT , --KRI내용
UNIT_C , --단위코드
BTCH_PGM_NM , --배치프로그램명
CALC_CRELT_V , --산출상관관계값
RESC_G_C , --입력구분
USYN , --사용여부
DR_DT , --등록일자 DR_TIME , --등록시간 DR_OP_JKW_NO , --등록조작자번호 CHG_DT , --변경일자 CHG_TIME , --변경시간 CHG_OP_JKW_NO --변경조작자번호 ) VALUES ( #{KRI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{RSK_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{RSK_FLD_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{RSK_BUMUN_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{RSK_B_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{KRI_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{UNIT,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{BTCH_PGM_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{CALC_CRELT_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{RESC_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{USYN,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

MERGE INTO RBA_IKRI_S A USING DUAL ON (KRI_NO = #{KRI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET KRI_V = #{KRI_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
, KRI_CALC_HIS = #{CALC_HIS,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( KRI_NO, -- KRI번호
KRI_CALC_HIS, -- 산출내역
KRI_V, -- KRI Data DR_DT, -- 등록일자 DR_TIME, -- 등록시간 DR_OP_JKW_NO -- 등록자조작번호 ) VALUES ( #{KRI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{CALC_HIS,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{KRI_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

MERGE INTO RBA_IKRI_D A USING DUAL ON (KRI_NO = #{KRI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND DR_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD')) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET KRI_V = #{KRI_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , KRI_CALC_HIS = #{CALC_HIS,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( KRI_NO, -- KRI번호 IN_DT, -- 입력일자 KRI_CALC_HIS, -- 산출내역 KRI_V, -- KRI Data DR_DT, -- 등록일자 DR_TIME, -- 등록시간 DR_OP_JKW_NO -- 등록자조작번호 ) VALUES ( #{KRI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), #{CALC_HIS,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{KRI_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

UPDATE RBA_KRI_M SET
KRI_NM = #{KRI_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
KRI_CTNT = #{CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UNIT_C = #{UNIT,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USYN = #{USYN,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESC_G_C = #{RESC_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE KRI_NO = #{KRI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: WITH STATE AS ( SELECT 'KRI' AS RSK_GUBUN, COUNT(A.KRI_NO) AS INDEX_CNT, COUNT(A.KRI_NO) AS INDI_RSK_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.RSK_G_C = '1' THEN '1' END) AS NATION_RSK, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.RSK_G_C = '2' THEN '1' END) AS CUSTOMER_RSK, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.RSK_G_C = '3' THEN '1' END) AS PRODUCT_RSK, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.RSK_G_C = '4' THEN '1' END) AS CHANNEL_RSK, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.RSK_G_C = '5' THEN '1' END) AS BUSINESS_RSK FROM RBA_KRI_M A WHERE A.RSK_B_C='I' AND A.USYN='1' UNION ALL SELECT 'KCI' AS RSK_GUBUN, COUNT(A.KCI_NO) AS INDEX_CNT, COUNT(A.KCI_NO) AS INDI_RSK_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.TONGJE_G_C = '1' THEN '1' END) AS NATION_RSK, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.TONGJE_G_C = '2' THEN '1' END) AS CUSTOMER_RSK, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.TONGJE_G_C = '3' THEN '1' END) AS PRODUCT_RSK, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.TONGJE_G_C = '4' THEN '1' END) AS CHANNEL_RSK, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.TONGJE_G_C = '5' THEN '1' END) AS BUSINESS_RSK FROM RBA_KCI_M A WHERE A.RSK_B_C='I' AND A.USYN='1' ) SELECT DECODE(RSK_GUBUN,NULL,'계',RSK_GUBUN) AS RSK_GUBUN, SUM(INDEX_CNT) AS INDEX_CNT, SUM(INDI_RSK_CNT) AS INDI_RSK_CNT, SUM(NATION_RSK) AS NATION_RSK, SUM(CUSTOMER_RSK) AS CUSTOMER_RSK, SUM(PRODUCT_RSK) AS PRODUCT_RSK, SUM(CHANNEL_RSK) AS CHANNEL_RSK, SUM(BUSINESS_RSK) AS BUSINESS_RSK FROM STATE GROUP BY ROLLUP(RSK_GUBUN)

SELECT KCI_NO, DR_DT, KCI_CALC_HIS AS CAL, DECODE(SIGN(NVL(KCI_V-LAG(KCI_V) OVER (ORDER BY DR_DT ASC),'0')),1,'+'||(KCI_V-LAG(KCI_V) OVER (ORDER BY DR_DT ASC)), -1, (KCI_V-LAG(KCI_V) OVER (ORDER BY DR_DT ASC)), 0 , 0) AS STATE , KCI_V, IN_DT, DR_OP_JKW_NO FROM RBA_IKCI_D WHERE KCI_NO = #{KCI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ORDER BY DR_DT DESC
mapper.update:

DR_DT , --등록일자 DR_TIME , --등록시간 DR_OP_JKW_NO , --등록조작자번호 CHG_DT , --변경일자 CHG_TIME , --변경시간 CHG_OP_JKW_NO --변경조작자번호 ) VALUES ( #{KCI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TONGJE_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TONGJE_FLD_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TONGJE_BUMUN_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{RSK_B_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

RESC_G_C = #{RESC_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE KRI_NO = #{KRI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: WITH KRI_INDI AS ( SELECT COUNT(A.KRI_NO) AS INDI_RSK_CNT FROM RBA_KRI_M A, RBA_TKRI_S B WHERE A.KRI_NO = B.KRI_NO(+) AND A.USYN='1' ) SELECT 'KRI' AS RSK_GUBUN, MAX(C.INDI_RSK_CNT) AS INDEX_CNT, COUNT(A.RSK_G_C) AS INDI_RSK_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.RSK_G_C = '1' THEN '1' END) AS NATION_RSK, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.RSK_G_C = '2' THEN '1' END) AS CUSTOMER_RSK, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.RSK_G_C = '3' THEN '1' END) AS PRODUCT_RSK, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.RSK_G_C = '4' THEN '1' END) AS CHANNEL_RSK, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.RSK_G_C = '5' THEN '1' END) AS BUSINESS_RSK FROM RBA_KRI_M A, RBA_TKRI_S B, KRI_INDI C WHERE A.KRI_NO = B.KRI_NO(+) AND A.RSK_B_C='T' AND A.USYN='1'
mapper.update:
UPDATE RBA_KCI_M SET KCI_NM = #{KCI_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, KCI_CTNT = #{CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UNIT_C = #{UNIT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USYN = #{USYN,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BTCH_PGM_NM = #{BTCH_PGM_NM,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CALC_CRELT_V = #{CALC_CRELT_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RESC_G_C = #{RESC_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{CHG_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE KCI_NO = #{KCI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: WITH KCI_INDI AS ( SELECT COUNT(A.KCI_NO) AS INDI_RSK_CNT FROM RBA_KCI_M A, RBA_TKCI_S B WHERE A.KCI_NO = B.KCI_NO(+) AND A.USYN='1' ) SELECT 'KCI' AS RSK_GUBUN, MAX(B.INDI_RSK_CNT) INDEX_CNT, COUNT(A.RSK_G_C) AS INDI_RSK_CNT, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.RSK_G_C = '1' THEN '1' END) AS NATION_RSK, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.RSK_G_C = '2' THEN '1' END) AS CUSTOMER_RSK, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.RSK_G_C = '3' THEN '1' END) AS PRODUCT_RSK, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.RSK_G_C = '4' THEN '1' END) AS CHANNEL_RSK, COUNT(CASE WHEN A.RSK_G_C = '5' THEN '1' END) AS BUSINESS_RSK FROM RBA_RSK_M A, (SELECT A.RSK_NO, MAX(A.KCI_NO) AS KCI_NO FROM RBA_RSK_KCI_MP A, RBA_KCI_M B WHERE A.KCI_NO = B.KCI_NO(+) AND RSK_B_C='T' AND USYN='1' GROUP BY A.RSK_NO) KCI, KCI_INDI B WHERE A.RSK_NO(+) = KCI.RSK_NO

mapper.select: SELECT VALT_TRN, DECODE(VALT_G,1,'정기평가',2,'수시평가','') AS VALT_G , VALT_SDT , VALT_EDT , VALT_PRE_SDT , VALT_PRE_ENDT , VALT_RSN_CTNT,VALT_DS_CTNT , DECODE(NVL2(ATTCH_FILE_NO,1,0),1,'Y',0,'N','N') AS ATTCH_FILE_YN , DECODE(VALT_JUNGJI_YN,1,'Y',0,'N','N') AS VALT_JUNGJI_YN , GET_LOGINID_NAME(DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS DR_OP_JKW_NO , DR_DT , VALT_JUNGJI_YN , ATTCH_FILE_NO FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE 1=1 ORDER BY VALT_TRN

SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT
FROM DUAL WHERE 1=1 AND #{VALT_EDT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} < (SELECT VALT_SDT FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE VALT_TRN= #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} +1)
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM dual WHERE 1=1 AND #{VALT_SDT,jdbcType=VARCHAR} > NVL((SELECT VALT_EDT FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE VALT_TRN = (SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD) ),'00000000')
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM DUAL WHERE #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} = (SELECT MAX(VALT_TRN) FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD)

SELECT ATTCH_FILE_NO, FILE_SER, DATA_G, FILE_POS, LOSC_FILE_NM, PHSC_FILE_NM, FILE_SIZE, DOWNLOAD_CNT, DR_OP_JKW_NO, GET_LOGINID_NAME(DR_OP_JKW_NO) AS REG_NM, DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE WHERE ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT CNTNT as CD ,CD_NM as CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'R010'
AND CNTNT LIKE #{HRNK_RBA_RSK_C_V,jdbcType=VARCHAR} || '%'
AND USE_F = 'Y' ORDER BY CD_RNK_SQ , CD_NM
SELECT VALT_TRN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN VALT_SDT AND VALT_EDT

TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO= #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT(RSK_NO, VALT_TRN, VALT_SER, MNG_BRNO, TONGJE_NO, RSK_G_C, RSK_FLD_C, RSK_BUMUN_C, TONGJE_G_C, VALT_JINHG_S_C, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO) VALUES(#{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TONGJE_FLD_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TONGJE_BUMUN_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{FCST_FRQ_VALT_GD,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{FCST_FRQ_VALT_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TRSR_LOSS_VALT_GD,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TRSR_LOSS_VALT_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{INDV_RSK_GD,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{INDV_RSK_VALT_PNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{VALT_JINHG_S_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT A.RSK_NO , A.VALT_JINHG_S_C , B.VALT_TRN , B.VALT_SER , (SELECT MNG_BRNO FROM RBA_RSK_M WHERE RSK_NO = A.RSK_NO) AS MNG_BRNO , B.TONGJE_NO , B.TONGJE_VALT_SER , NVL(B.RSK_G_C, ( SELECT RSK_G_C FROM RBA_RSK_M WHERE RSK_NO = A.RSK_NO ) ) AS RSK_G_C , NVL(B.RSK_FLD_C, ( SELECT RSK_FLD_C FROM RBA_RSK_M WHERE RSK_NO = A.RSK_NO ) ) AS RSK_FLD_C , NVL(B.RSK_BUMUN_C, ( SELECT RSK_BUMUN_C FROM RBA_RSK_M WHERE RSK_NO = A.RSK_NO ) ) AS RSK_BUMUN_C , B.TONGJE_G_C , B.TONGJE_FLD_C , B.TONGJE_BUMUN_C , B.FCST_FRQ_VALT_GD , B.FCST_FRQ_VALT_CTNT , B.TRSR_LOSS_VALT_GD , B.TRSR_LOSS_VALT_CTNT , B.EFCT_VALT_DT , B.EFCT_VALT_TIME , B.EFCT_VALT_OP_JKW_NO , B.RSK_VALT_BAS_SER , B.DESN_VALT_GD , B.DESN_VALT_CTNT , B.UNYUNG_VALT_GD , B.UNYUNG_VALT_CTNT , B.TONGJE_VALT_DT , B.TONGJE_VALT_TIME , B.TONGJE_VALT_OP_JWK_NO , B.TONGJE_VALT_BAS_SER , B.TONGJE_CH_RESC_C , B.TONGJE_CH_CAUSE_C , B.TONGJE_CH_ANAL_CTNT , B.INDV_RSK_VALT_PNT , B.INDV_RSK_GD , B.INDV_RSK_GD_SER , B.MOFC_TONGJE_VALT_PNT , B.MOFC_TONGJE_GD , B.REMDR_RSK_PNT , B.REMDR_RSK_GD , B.REMDR_RSK_GD_SER , B.IMPRV_K_C , B.GYLJ_DT , B.GYLJ_JKW_NO , B.LST_VALT_YN , B.VALT_DT FROM RBA_RSK_M A ,RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B WHERE 1=1 AND A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO(+) AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN(+) AND A.LST_VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER(+) AND A.LST_VALT_TRN = #{LST_VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.LST_VALT_SER = #{LST_VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.RSK_B_C = 'I' AND A.USYN = 1 AND A.GYLJ_S_C = 1 AND A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO RBA_VALT_G_H ( RSK_NO , VALT_TRN , VALT_SER , MNG_BRNO , GYLJ_SER , VALT_JINHG_S_C , GYLJ_DT , GYLJ_JKW_NO , ROLE_ID , DR_DT , DR_TIME , DR_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , NVL ( #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 1 ) , NVL ( #{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , 1 ) , #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , NVL2( ( SELECT MAX(RSK_NO) FROM RBA_VALT_G_H WHERE RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_SER = #{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) , ( SELECT MAX(GYLJ_SER) +1 FROM RBA_VALT_G_H WHERE RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_SER = #{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) , 1 ) , #{VALT_JINHG_S_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , #{ROLE_ID,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

UPDATE RBA_IRSK_VALT_I SET IMPRV_K_C = #{IMPRV_K_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , GYLJ_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , GYLJ_JKW_NO = #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , LST_VALT_YN = #{LST_VALT_YN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , VALT_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_SER = #{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 1 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 1) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD11 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 1 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 2) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD12 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 1 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 3) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD13 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 1 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 4) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD14 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 1 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 5) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD15
,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 2 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 1) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD21 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 2 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 2) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD22 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 2 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 3) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD23 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 2 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 4) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD24 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 2 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 5) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD25
,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 3 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 1) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD31 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 3 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 2) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD32 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 3 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 3) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD33 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 3 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 4) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD34 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 3 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 5) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD35
,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 4 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 1) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD41 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 4 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 2) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD42 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 4 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 3) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD43 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 4 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 4) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD44 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 4 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 5) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD45
,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 5 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 1) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD51 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 5 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 2) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD52 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 5 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 3) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD53 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 5 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 4) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD54 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 5 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 5) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS R_GD55
FROM RBA_RSK_GD_M A, RBA_RSK_GD_S B WHERE A.RSK_GD_HMK_C = 1 AND A.RSK_GD_HMK_C = B.RSK_GD_HMK_C AND A.LST_SER = B.RSK_GD_SER

SELECT NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 1 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 1) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS J_GD11 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 1 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 2) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS J_GD12 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 1 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 3) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS J_GD13 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 1 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 4) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS J_GD14
,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 2 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 1) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS J_GD21 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 2 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 2) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS J_GD22 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 2 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 3) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS J_GD23 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 2 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 4) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS J_GD24
,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 3 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 1) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS J_GD31 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 3 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 2) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS J_GD32 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 3 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 3) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS J_GD33 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 3 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 4) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS J_GD34
,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 4 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 1) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS J_GD41 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 4 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 2) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS J_GD42 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 4 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 3) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS J_GD43 ,NVL(MAX(CASE WHEN (B.RSK_GD_X_V = 4 AND RSK_GD_Y_V = 4) THEN B.RSK_GD END),'1') AS J_GD44
FROM RBA_RSK_GD_M A, RBA_RSK_GD_S B WHERE A.RSK_GD_HMK_C = 2 AND A.RSK_GD_HMK_C = B.RSK_GD_HMK_C AND A.LST_SER = B.RSK_GD_SER
SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN VALT_HMK_C = 'I1' THEN LST_SER END) AS RSK_VALT_BAS_SER , MAX(CASE WHEN VALT_HMK_C = 'T1' THEN LST_SER END) AS TONGJE_VALT_BAS_SER FROM RBA_VALT_B_M
SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN RSK_GD_HMK_C = '1' THEN LST_SER END) AS INDV_RSK_GD_SER , MAX(CASE WHEN RSK_GD_HMK_C = '2' THEN LST_SER END) AS REMDR_RSK_GD_SER FROM RBA_RSK_GD_M

SELECT MAX(CASE WHEN (CNTNT=1) THEN CD_NM END) AS J1 , MAX(CASE WHEN (CNTNT=2) THEN CD_NM END) AS J2 , MAX(CASE WHEN (CNTNT=3) THEN CD_NM END) AS J3 , MAX(CASE WHEN (CNTNT=4) THEN CD_NM END) AS J4 FROM NIC92B WHERE CD = 'R013' AND USE_F = 'Y' ORDER BY CD_RNK_SQ , CD_NM
select NVL( ( SELECT VALT_JUNGJI_YN FROM RBA_RSK_VALT_SCHD WHERE TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN VALT_SDT AND VALT_EDT), 0 ) AS VALT_JUNGJI_YN FROM DUAL

mapper.update: INSERT INTO RBA_IRSK_KRI_VALT_D (RSK_NO, VALT_TRN, VALT_SER, KRI_NO, RSK_G_C, RSK_FLD_C, RSK_BUMUN_C, IN_DT, KRI_CALC_HIS, KRI_V, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{KRI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , ( SELECT RSK_G_C FROM RBA_KRI_M WHERE KRI_NO = #{KRI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) , ( SELECT RSK_FLD_C FROM RBA_KRI_M WHERE KRI_NO = #{KRI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) , ( SELECT RSK_BUMUN_C FROM RBA_KRI_M WHERE KRI_NO = #{KRI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) , TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , ( SELECT KRI_CALC_HIS FROM RBA_IKRI_S WHERE KRI_NO = #{KRI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) , NVL( ( SELECT KRI_V FROM RBA_IKRI_S WHERE KRI_NO = #{KRI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ), 0) ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') ,TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') ,#{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

UPDATE RBA_RSK_M SET LST_VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , LST_VALT_SER = #{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR} , CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') , CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS') , CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT '' AS SELECTED, B.KRI_NO AS KRI_NO, B.KRI_NM AS KRI_NM, C.KRI_V AS KRI_Data, B.UNIT_C AS KRI_UNIT, GET_CODE_NAME ('R011', B.UNIT_C) AS KRI_UNIT_NM, B.KRI_CTNT AS KRI_CTNT, A.DR_DT as KRI_DR_DT FROM RBA_RSK_KRI_MP A, RBA_KRI_M B, RBA_IKRI_S C WHERE A.KRI_NO = B.KRI_NO(+) AND B.KRI_NO = C.KRI_NO(+) AND A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

mapper.select: SELECT '' AS SELECTED, B.KRI_NO AS KRI_NO, B.KRI_NM AS KRI_NM, C.KRI_V AS KRI_DATA, B.UNIT_C AS KRI_UNIT, GET_CODE_NAME ('R011', B.UNIT_C) AS KRI_UNIT_NM, B.KRI_CTNT AS KRI_CTNT, A.DR_DT as KRI_DR_DT FROM RBA_RSK_KRI_MP A, RBA_KRI_M B, RBA_TKRI_S C WHERE A.KRI_NO = B.KRI_NO(+) AND B.KRI_NO = C.KRI_NO(+) AND A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

SELECT '' AS SELECTED, B.KCI_NO AS KCI_NO, B.KCI_NM AS KCI_NM, C.KCI_V AS KCI_DATA, B.UNIT_C AS KCI_UNIT, GET_CODE_NAME ('R011', B.UNIT_C) AS KCI_UNIT_NM, B.KCI_CTNT AS KCI_CTNT, A.DR_DT as KCI_DR_DT FROM RBA_RSK_KCI_MP A, RBA_KCI_M B, RBA_TKCI_S C WHERE A.KCI_NO = B.KCI_NO(+) AND B.KCI_NO = C.KCI_NO(+) AND A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT NVL(MAX(GYLJ_SER),0)+1 AS MAX_SER FROM RBA_RSK_G_H WHERE RSK_NO =#{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: INSERT INTO RBA_RSK_G_H(RSK_NO,GYLJ_S_C, GYLJ_SER, GYLJ_DT, GYLJ_JKW_NO, ROLE_ID, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO) VALUES(#{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'1',#{GYLJ_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), #{GYLJ_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{ROLE_ID,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{GYLJ_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(B.TONGJE_VALT_DT),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS GYLJ_DT, A.RSK_NO AS RSK_NO, B.TONGJE_NO AS TONGJE_NO, (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD ='R023' AND CNTNT = B.IMPRV_K_C) AS IMPRV_K_C, B.REMDR_RSK_GD AS REMDR_RSK_GD, B.MNG_BRNO AS MNG_BRNO, (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD ='R009' AND CNTNT = B.TONGJE_CH_RESC_C) AS TONGJE_CH_RESC_C, (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD ='R010' AND CNTNT = B.TONGJE_CH_CAUSE_C) AS TONGJE_CH_CAUSE_C, C.IMPRV_VALT_JONGHAP_GD AS IMPRV_VALT_JONGHAP_GD, (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD ='R016' AND CNTNT = C.IMPRV_JINHG_S_C) AS IMPRV_JINHG_S_C, C.PLCY_DSCT_GD AS PLCY_DSCT_GD, C.RSK_PROC_GD AS RSK_PROC_GD, C.INJK_RESRC_GD AS INJK_RESRC_GD, C.INF_SYS_GD AS INF_SYS_GD, NVL((SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD ='R016' AND CNTNT = C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C),'미진행') AS IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C AS PROC_APRV_S_CODE, NVL((SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD ='R016' AND CNTNT = C.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C),'미진행') AS IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C2, D.IMPRV_V_C AS IMPRV_V_C, D.IMPRV_G_C AS IMPRV_G_C, D.IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C AS IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C, (SELECT IMPRV_PROC_CTNT FROM RBA_TJ_IMPRV_P_D WHERE RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN=#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_SER=#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C='1') AS IMPRV_PROC_CTNT1, (SELECT IMPRV_PROC_CTNT FROM RBA_TJ_IMPRV_P_D WHERE RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN=#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_SER=#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C='2') AS IMPRV_PROC_CTNT2, (SELECT IMPRV_PROC_CTNT FROM RBA_TJ_IMPRV_P_D WHERE RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN=#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_SER=#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C='3') AS IMPRV_PROC_CTNT3 FROM RBA_RSK_M A LEFT JOIN RBA_IRSK_VALT_I B ON A.RSK_NO=B.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN=B.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER=B.VALT_SER LEFT JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_V_I C ON A.RSK_NO=C.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN=C.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER=C.VALT_SER LEFT JOIN RBA_TJ_IMPRV_P_D D ON A.RSK_NO=D.RSK_NO AND A.LST_VALT_TRN=D.VALT_TRN AND A.LST_VALT_SER=D.VALT_SER WHERE A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.LST_VALT_TRN=#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.LST_VALT_SER=#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO RBA_TJ_IMPRV_P_D USING DUAL ON(RSK_NO=#{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN=#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_SER=#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND TONGJE_NO=#{TONGJE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C = #{IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET MNG_BRNO=#{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMPRV_V_C=#{IMPRV_V_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMPRV_G_C=#{IMPRV_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMPRV_PROC_WRT_DT=TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO= #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMPRV_PROC_CTNT= #{IMPRV_PROC_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C=#{IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT=TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME=TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO=#{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT( RSK_NO, VALT_TRN, VALT_SER, TONGJE_NO, IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C, MNG_BRNO, IMPRV_V_C, IMPRV_G_C, IMPRV_PROC_WRT_DT, IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO, IMPRV_PROC_CTNT, IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{TONGJE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{IMPRV_V_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{IMPRV_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{IMPRV_PROC_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(C.VALT_DT),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS GYLJ_DT, (SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD ='R023' AND CNTNT = B.IMPRV_K_C) AS IMPRV_K_C, A.KCI_NO, A.IMPRV_VALT_JONGHAP_GD AS IMPRV_VALT_JONGHAP_GD, NVL((SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD ='R016' AND CNTNT = A.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C),'미진행') AS IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, NVL((SELECT CD_NM FROM NIC92B WHERE CD ='R016' AND CNTNT = A.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C),'미진행') AS IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C2, A.IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C AS PROC_APRV_S_CODE, A.PLCY_DSCT_GD AS PLCY_DSCT_GD, A.RSK_PROC_GD AS RSK_PROC_GD, A.INJK_RESRC_GD AS INJK_RESRC_GD, A.INF_SYS_GD AS INF_SYS_GD, A.RSK_NO AS RSK_NO, D.IMPRV_V_C AS IMPRV_V_C, D.IMPRV_G_C AS IMPRV_G_C, D.IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C AS IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C, E.KCI_NM AS KCI_NM, (SELECT IMPRV_PROC_CTNT FROM RBA_KCI_IMPRV_P_D WHERE RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN=#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_SER=#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND KCI_NO = #{KCI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C='1') AS IMPRV_PROC_CTNT1, (SELECT IMPRV_PROC_CTNT FROM RBA_KCI_IMPRV_P_D WHERE RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN=#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_SER=#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND KCI_NO=#{KCI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C='2') AS IMPRV_PROC_CTNT2, (SELECT IMPRV_PROC_CTNT FROM RBA_KCI_IMPRV_P_D WHERE RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN=#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_SER=#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND KCI_NO=#{KCI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C='3') AS IMPRV_PROC_CTNT3, F.KCI_NMRT_V||'/'||F.KCI_DNMT_V||' ('||NVL(round(F.KCI_NMRT_V/DECODE(F.KCI_DNMT_V,0,NULL,F.KCI_DNMT_V)*100,2),0)||'%)' AS NMRT_DNMT_V, (SELECT MAX(VALT_PNT) FROM RBA_TKCI_S WHERE VALT_GD='2' AND KCI_NO=#{KCI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AS IMGE_V FROM RBA_KCI_IMPRV_V_I A LEFT JOIN RBA_TRSK_KCI_VALT_D B ON A.RSK_NO = B.RSK_NO AND A.VALT_TRN = B.VALT_TRN AND A.VALT_SER = B.VALT_SER AND A.MNG_BRNO = B.MNG_BRNO AND A.KCI_NO = B.KCI_NO LEFT JOIN RBA_TRSK_VALT_I C ON A.RSK_NO=C.RSK_NO AND A.VALT_TRN = C.VALT_TRN AND A.VALT_SER = C.VALT_SER AND A.MNG_BRNO = C.MNG_BRNO LEFT JOIN RBA_KCI_IMPRV_P_D D ON A.RSK_NO = D.RSK_NO AND A.VALT_TRN = D.VALT_TRN AND A.VALT_SER = D.VALT_SER AND A.MNG_BRNO = D.MNG_BRNO AND A.KCI_NO = D.KCI_NO ,RBA_KCI_M E ,RBA_TKCI_D F WHERE A.KCI_NO = E.KCI_NO AND A.KCI_NO = F.KCI_NO AND F.MNG_BRNO='9999' AND A.RSK_NO = #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_TRN=#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.VALT_SER=#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.MNG_BRNO=#{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND A.KCI_NO=#{KCI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO RBA_KCI_IMPRV_V_I USING DUAL ON(RSK_NO=#{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN=#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_SER=#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND KCI_NO=#{KCI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND MNG_BRNO = #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET IMPRV_JINHG_S_C = #{IMPRV_JINHG_S_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C = #{INF_SYS_GD,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, PLCY_DSCT_CTNT = #{PLCY_DSCT_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RSK_PROC_CTNT = #{RSK_PROC_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INJK_RESRC_CTNT = #{INJK_RESRC_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INF_SYS_CTNT = #{INF_SYS_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO = #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ATTCH_FILE_NO = #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT(RSK_NO, VALT_TRN, VALT_SER, KCI_NO, MNG_BRNO, IMPRV_JINHG_S_C, IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, IMPRV_DS_CHCE_DT, IMPRV_VALT_JONGHAP_GD, IMPRV_VALT_JKW_NO, PLCY_DSCT_GD, RSK_PROC_GD, INJK_RESRC_GD, INF_SYS_GD, PLCY_DSCT_CTNT, RSK_PROC_CTNT, INJK_RESRC_CTNT, INF_SYS_CTNT, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO, ATTCH_FILE_NO ) VALUES(#{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{KCI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, MERGE INTO RBA_KCI_IMPRV_P_D USING DUAL ON(RSK_NO=#{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN=#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_SER=#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND KCI_NO=#{KCI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C = #{IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND MNG_BRNO=#{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET IMPRV_V_C=#{IMPRV_V_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMPRV_G_C=#{IMPRV_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMPRV_PROC_WRT_DT=TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO= #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMPRV_PROC_CTNT= #{IMPRV_PROC_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C=#{IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT=TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME=TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO=#{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT( RSK_NO, VALT_TRN, VALT_SER, KCI_NO, IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C, MNG_BRNO, IMPRV_V_C, IMPRV_G_C, IMPRV_PROC_WRT_DT, IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO, IMPRV_PROC_CTNT, IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{KCI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{IMPRV_V_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{IMPRV_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{IMPRV_PROC_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )

MERGE INTO RBA_KCI_IMPRV_P_D USING DUAL ON(RSK_NO=#{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_TRN=#{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND VALT_SER=#{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND KCI_NO=#{KCI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C = #{IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND MNG_BRNO=#{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET IMPRV_V_C=#{IMPRV_V_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMPRV_G_C=#{IMPRV_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMPRV_PROC_WRT_DT=TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO= #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMPRV_PROC_CTNT= #{IMPRV_PROC_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C=#{IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT=TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_TIME=TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO=#{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT( RSK_NO, VALT_TRN, VALT_SER, KCI_NO, IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C, MNG_BRNO, IMPRV_V_C, IMPRV_G_C, IMPRV_PROC_WRT_DT, IMPRV_PROC_JWK_NO, IMPRV_PROC_CTNT, IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C, DR_DT, DR_TIME, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_TIME, CHG_OP_JKW_NO ) VALUES ( #{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{VALT_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{KCI_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{IMPRV_PROC_HMK_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{IMPRV_V_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{IMPRV_G_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{IMPRV_PROC_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{IMPRV_PROC_APRV_S_C,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'HH24MISS'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select: SELECT ATTCH_FILE_NO AS ATTCH_FILE_NO, FILE_SER AS FILE_SER, DATA_G AS DATA_G, FILE_POS AS FILE_POS, LOSC_FILE_NM AS LOSC_FILE_NM, PHSC_FILE_NM AS PHSC_FILE_NM, FILE_SIZE AS FILE_SIZE, DR_DT AS DR_DT FROM RBA_ATTCH_FILE WHERE ATTCH_FILE_NO =#{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT NVL(MAX(DATA_SER)+1,1) AS MAX_SER FROM RBA_CMM_DATA
mapper.update: INSERT INTO RBA_CMM_DATA(DATA_SER, DATA_TTL, DATA_CTNT, DATA_G, ATTCH_FILE_NO, USYN, DR_DT, DR_OP_JKW_NO, CHG_DT, CHG_OP_JKW_NO) VALUES(#{DATA_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{DATA_TTL,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{DATA_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{DATA_G2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{USYN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

UPDATE RBA_CMM_DATA SET DATA_TTL = #{DATA_TTL,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DATA_CTNT = #{DATA_CTNT,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, DATA_G=#{DATA_G2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, ATTCH_FILE_NO=#{ATTCH_FILE_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USYN=#{USYN,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CHG_DT= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'), CHG_OP_JKW_NO= #{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHERE DATA_SER=#{DATA_SER,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT RSK_NO, MNG_BRNO, (SELECT DEP_TITLE FROM C_DEP_INFO WHERE DEP_DESC = MNG_BRNO) MNG_BRNM FROM RBA_TRSK_BRNO WHERE RSK_NO=#{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
SELECT DPRT_CD AS MNG_BRNO, DPRT_NM AS MNG_BRNM FROM NIC41B WHERE NOT EXISTS(SELECT MNG_BRNO FROM RBA_TRSK_BRNO WHERE DPRT_CD=MNG_BRNO AND RSK_NO=#{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) AND MOFC_BRN_CCD='B'
mapper.update: INSERT INTO RBA_TRSK_BRNO(RSK_NO, MNG_BRNO, DR_DT,DR_OP_JKW_NO) VALUES(#{RSK_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{MNG_BRNO,jdbcType=VARCHAR},TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD'),#{DR_OP_JKW_NO,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT VALT_TRN AS CODE, VALT_TRN||'회차' as NAME FROM RBA_MONITR_M WHERE TOT_YN = '1' ORDER BY VALT_TRN

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY CC.VALT_TRN) AS NUM, CC.VALT_TRN AS VALT_TRN FROM(SELECT BB.VALT_TRN AS VALT_TRN FROM(SELECT DISTINCT VALT_TRN FROM RBA_MONITR_JIPYO_M WHERE TOT_YN ='1' ORDER BY VALT_TRN DESC)BB WHERE ROWNUM<=5)CC

SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(AA.VALT_SDT,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALT_SDT ,AA.JIPYO_UNTY_V AS JIPYO_UNTY_V1 ,AA.VALT_PNT AS VALT_PNT1 ,AA.VALT_GD AS VALT_GD1 ,BB.JIPYO_UNTY_V AS JIPYO_UNTY_V2 ,BB.VALT_PNT AS VALT_PNT2 ,BB.VALT_GD AS VALT_GD2 ,CC.VALT_PNT AS VALT_PNT3 ,CC.VALT_GD AS VALT_GD3 FROM (SELECT VALT_SDT, JIPYO_UNTY_V, VALT_PNT, VALT_GD FROM RBA_MONITR_JIPYO_M WHERE JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = 'IRSK' AND TOT_YN = '1' AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AA, (SELECT JIPYO_UNTY_V, VALT_PNT, VALT_GD FROM RBA_MONITR_JIPYO_M WHERE JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = 'ITONGJE' AND TOT_YN = '1' AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ROWNUM = 1 ) BB, (SELECT VALT_PNT, VALT_GD FROM RBA_MONITR_JIPYO_M WHERE JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = 'IREMDR' AND TOT_YN = '1' AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ROWNUM = 1 ) CC

SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(AA.VALT_SDT,'YYYYMMDD'),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS VALT_SDT ,AA.JIPYO_UNTY_V AS JIPYO_UNTY_V1 ,AA.VALT_PNT AS VALT_PNT1 ,AA.VALT_GD AS VALT_GD1 ,BB.JIPYO_UNTY_V AS JIPYO_UNTY_V2 ,BB.VALT_PNT AS VALT_PNT2 ,BB.VALT_GD AS VALT_GD2 ,CC.JIPYO_UNTY_V AS JIPYO_UNTY_V3 ,CC.VALT_PNT AS VALT_PNT3 ,CC.VALT_GD AS VALT_GD3 ,DD.VALT_PNT AS VALT_PNT4 ,DD.VALT_GD AS VALT_GD4 FROM (SELECT VALT_SDT, JIPYO_UNTY_V, VALT_PNT, VALT_GD FROM RBA_MONITR_JIPYO_M WHERE JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = 'TKRI' AND TOT_YN = '1' AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ROWNUM = 1 ) AA, (SELECT JIPYO_UNTY_V, VALT_PNT, VALT_GD FROM RBA_MONITR_JIPYO_M WHERE JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = 'TKCI' AND TOT_YN = '1' AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ROWNUM = 1 ) BB, (SELECT JIPYO_UNTY_V, VALT_PNT, VALT_GD FROM RBA_MONITR_JIPYO_M WHERE JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = 'TTONGJE' AND TOT_YN = '1' AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ROWNUM = 1 ) CC, (SELECT VALT_PNT, VALT_GD FROM RBA_MONITR_JIPYO_M WHERE JIPYO_PNT_HMK_C = 'TREMDR' AND TOT_YN = '1' AND VALT_TRN = #{VALT_TRN,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND ROWNUM = 1 ) DD
